description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish library that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow should have four jobs: check-javascript, pylint, test, and publish. The check-javascript job should run on ubuntu-latest, check out the code, set up Node.js 16.17.0, install dependencies, lint JavaScript, and build a JavaScript bundle. The pylint job should set up Python 3.10, install dependencies, and run pylint. The test job should use a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.8 to 3.13, install dependencies, and run tests with tox. The publish job should depend on the previous jobs, build artifacts, and publish a Python distribution to PyPI using a token from secrets.
